title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.220 - If answer or motion filed, cause to proceed
text:
511.220.  If answer or motion filed, cause to proceed. — If the answer or motion is filed within the time so limited, the cause shall proceed as it would have done had the defendant appeared to the summons and filed his answer or motion to the petition; if not, the judgment shall be made absolute.
(RSMo 1939 § 1252, A. 1949 H.B. 2119) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1086; 1919 § 1537; 1909 § 2106
